hypothesis: When the DPO reward is modified to enforce BCC–B2 coexistence with ≥20% B2 at 1473 K, a LLaMA‑3.1‑8B model fine-tuned under the same protocol will generate at least 2× more alloys satisfying this high‑temperature criterion than the current DPO LLaMA, while maintaining coverage recall ≥0.98 and pair uniqueness (unique pairs @100) ≥0.95.
